𝗙𝗜𝗟𝗘𝗕𝗥𝗢𝗪𝗦𝗘𝗥 | Self-hosted web-based file management and administration.  🔥 Super Hot!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Self-hosted web-based file management and administration.
📅 Created: Jun 2023 • Updated: Jul 2026

❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀❀

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Web-based file management
✅ User and access control
✅ File sharing with customizable options
✅ OIDC, LDAP, JWT, password + 2FA, and proxy login support
✅ Responsive and customizable UI
✅ Sqlite indexing with real-time search and updates
✅ Enhanced thumbnail support (office, video, 3D models)
✅ Developer API with Swagger documentation
✅ Directory-level access control

FileBrowser Quantum is a self-hosted, web-based file manager that offers advanced features for managing files, users, and access permissions. It aims to be a user-friendly and powerful alternative to existing solutions, with a focus on a streamlined configuration and an efficient user interface.

𝗡𝗘𝗢𝗛𝗧𝗢𝗣 | Desktop system monitoring and process management  🔥 Super Hot!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 💻 Svelte 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Desktop system monitoring and process management
📅 Created: Oct 2024 • Updated: Jul 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Real-time process monitoring
✅ CPU and Memory usage tracking
✅ Modern UI with dark/light themes
✅ Advanced process search and filtering
✅ Pin important processes
✅ Process management (kill processes)
✅ Sort by any column
✅ Auto-refresh system stats

NeoHtop is a modern, cross-platform desktop system monitor built with Rust, Tauri, and Svelte. It provides real-time process monitoring, CPU and memory usage tracking, advanced search and filtering, and process management features in a visually appealing UI.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗟𝗨𝗞𝗦𝗕𝗢𝗫 | Securely storing and accessing sensitive files on untrusted or shared storage media, such as cloud services or external drives, with advanced cryptographic protection.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🦀 Rust 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Securely storing and accessing sensitive files on untrusted or shared storage media, such as cloud services or external drives, with advanced cryptographic protection.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Encrypted container creation for sensitive files
✅ Support for passphrase, FIDO2, TPM 2.0/SEP, and hybrid post-quantum keys (ML-KEM)
✅ Mounts as a real drive on Linux, macOS, and Windows
✅ Tamper-evident and opaque to cloud providers
✅ Detachable header and post-quantum sidecar options
✅ Rust-based with an Apache-2.0 license


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 671 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 53 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 4 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LUKSbox is a Rust-based tool for creating encrypted file containers (vaults) that can be securely stored on untrusted media like cloud storage or USB drives. It supports modern and post-quantum cryptographic keys, including FIDO2 hardware keys and TPM, and mounts as a virtual drive on major operating systems.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✅ Admin interface for manual deletion

TempFastMail is a self-hosted, disposable email inbox solution built with PHP and React. It allows users to receive and display emails temporarily, with automatic deletion after 48 hours, ensuring privacy. It's designed for quick setup using Docker Compose and integration with services like Cloudflare Email Workers.

Flutter Agent Panel is a cross-platform desktop application that unifies a terminal emulator with AI agent management. It allows developers to organize their CLI tools and AI assistants within distinct workspaces, streamlining AI-powered pair-coding and command-line workflows.
